hero.title: Practical assessments for clearer decisions.
copy: A growing set of Corbelle tools for leaders who need to pressure-test a decision, understand a leadership pattern, or create a sharper starting point for a conversation.
These are not diagnosis engines. They are structured prompts for better judgement.

intro.title: Start with the tool closest to the decision in front of you.
intro.copy: Each assessment is designed to return a practical frame: what appears promising, what needs testing, and where a leadership conversation should begin.

tools.title: AI Implementation Cost Validator
tools.description: Model the full operating cost of an AI use case, including seats, usage, review time and overhead.

tools.title: Cost of Inaction Diagnostic
tools.description: Quantify the financial case for acting now on a technology investment before operational drag becomes unavoidable.

tools.title: Use Case Validator
tools.description: Pressure-test an AI or technology use case before time, money, and political capital are committed.

tools.title: Magnetic Leadership
tools.description: Assess how your leadership presence is experienced, where it creates pull, and where it may create drag.

tools.title: Clarity Engine
tools.description: A Cowork skill for turning high-stakes choices into decision memos, review loops, and pattern analysis over time.

tools.title: AI Operating Model
tools.description: A practical review of whether your organisation has the ownership, capacity, and governance needed for AI adoption.

note.copy: Tools will continue to be added that can help businesses like yours make great decisions.
